name: forgeloop
description: Initiative-first, milestone-gated engineering workflow for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Recommend, grill, plan, and run initiative-based engineering loops in Codex
interface.longDescription: A lightweight Codex workflow layer built around initiative recommendations, DESIGN.md decision records, PLAN.md authoring, milestone execution, active initiative sequences, reviewer verdicts, Git evidence, and a minimal LEDGER.md recovery record.
defaultPrompt: Use Forgeloop to recommend the next initiatives from this source baseline.
Use Forgeloop to grill this candidate initiative into DESIGN.md before planning.
Use Forgeloop to plan this initiative into PLAN.md and LEDGER.md.
Use Forgeloop to run this initiative by milestone.
Use Forgeloop to run a sequence of active initiatives.
